high_level_description: A clean technical diagram for an ML research paper showing how supervised fine-tuning transfers epistemic priors in language models, with three main stages flowing left to right and divergent outcomes at the bottom

style_description.aesthetics: modern minimal, clean, professional, authoritative, academic conference quality, no decoration
style_description.lighting: even, flat, uniform, subtle drop shadows on boxes only
style_description.photo: technical illustration, clean diagram style, rounded geometric shapes, generous whitespace, crisp sans-serif typography

compositional_deconstruction.background: pure white background, clean and minimal, no texture or gradient

elements.desc: a rounded rectangle box in cool gray color, labeled 'Pre-trained Model' at top, with subtitle 'Qwen3.5-9B' inside, clean sans-serif text, modern design
a rounded rectangle box in deep teal color, labeled 'SFT with DM Data' at top, with text 'QLoRA Fine-tuning' and '1,460 DM Q&A pairs' inside, clean sans-serif text
a rounded rectangle box in burnt coral color, labeled 'Finetuned Model' at top, with subtitle 'Qwen3.5-9B (SFT)' inside, with a small warning triangle icon overlay, clean sans-serif text
a thick dark arrow pointing right, connecting the pre-trained box to the SFT box
a thick dark arrow pointing right, connecting the SFT box to the finetuned box
a dashed curved arrow looping from the right side back to the center, dark gray color
a rounded rectangle box in green color at bottom left, labeled 'Formal Causal Logic' with 'Corr2Cause: +38.3pp' and checkmark symbols for 'Conditional independence' and 'Confounder detection'
a rounded rectangle box in coral color at bottom right, labeled 'Applied Causal ID' with 'EconCausal: -12.4pp' and X marks for '+ to mixed hedging' and 'Structural over-skepticism'
small text label between the two bottom boxes
